# Implement Smart Conflict Detection and Resolution

## Description
The AI agent should be able to detect scheduling conflicts and provide intelligent suggestions for resolution. This includes checking existing events, considering travel time, and suggesting alternative times.

## Type
- **Type:** New Feature
- **Priority:** High
- **Component:** AI Agent
- **Milestone:** AI Agent v1.1

## Use Case
When a user says "Schedule a dentist appointment for tomorrow at 2pm", the AI should:
1. Check for existing conflicts at that time
2. If conflict exists, suggest alternative times
3. Consider travel time between locations
4. Provide reasoning for suggestions

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Detect scheduling conflicts with existing events
- [ ] Consider travel time between different locations
- [ ] Suggest alternative times when conflicts occur
- [ ] Provide clear reasoning for suggestions
- [ ] Handle multiple family members' schedules
- [ ] Consider event priorities and types
- [ ] Support for buffer time between events

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Enhance `findFreeSlot` tool with conflict detection
- [ ] Add travel time calculation logic
- [ ] Implement smart suggestion algorithm
- [ ] Update AI prompts to handle conflict scenarios
- [ ] Add conflict resolution tools
- [ ] Consider location-based scheduling

## Implementation Notes
- Use Google Maps API for travel time calculations
- Implement buffer time between events (default 15 minutes)
- Consider event priority when suggesting alternatives
- Handle multiple family members' schedules simultaneously
